question_text: Define what is meant by the term 'gravitational field'.
correct_answer: A region of space surrounding a mass where a gravitational force is exerted on any object placed within it.
explanation: A gravitational field is the invisible area of space around any massive object (like Earth) where gravity works. Any object placed in this field experiences a pull towards the massive object. Earth's gravitational field is why objects fall downwards and why we have weight.
